title: Syrian Quesadilla
description: A twist on traditional quesadillas, this recipe combines the flavors of Syria with the comfort of melted cheese.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Lay a quesadilla flat and sprinkle a quarter of the Syrian cheese over half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the cheese.
Place the quesadilla in the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the other side is also crispy.
Repeat with the remaining quesadillas and cheese.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve immediately.
Optional: Sprinkle a pinch of salty on top of each quesadilla before serving.
